home.metadata.title: IBANforge — IBAN Validation & BIC/SWIFT Lookup API
home.metadata.description: IBAN validation, BIC/SWIFT lookup, SEPA compliance, issuer classification, and risk indicators for developers and AI agents. Free during beta.
home.metadata.og.title: IBANforge
home.metadata.og.description: IBAN validation & BIC/SWIFT lookup API with compliance data for AI agents
home.hero.description: IBAN validation, BIC/SWIFT lookup, SEPA compliance & risk indicators for developers and AI agents
home.features.heading: Everything you need
home.features.0.title: IBAN Validation
home.features.0.description: Full IBAN validation with BBAN structure parsing. Supports 75+ countries with mod97 checksum verification and detailed field breakdown.
home.features.1.title: BIC/SWIFT Lookup
home.features.1.description: Complete BIC/SWIFT database sourced from GLEIF, enriched with LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) data for financial institution identification.
home.features.2.title: Compliance Ready
home.features.2.description: SEPA membership, payment schemes (SCT/SDD/SCT_INST), and Verification of Payee (VoP) requirement per country. Built for EU regulatory compliance.
home.features.3.title: Issuer Classification
home.features.3.description: Identifies if the issuer is a traditional bank, neobank, EMI, or payment institution. Detects virtual IBANs for AML/CFT compliance workflows.
home.features.4.title: Risk Indicators
home.features.4.description: Composite risk signal per IBAN: issuer type, country risk (FATF-based), test BIC detection, SEPA reachability, and VoP coverage in one object.
home.features.5.title: AI Agent Ready
home.features.5.description: Native Model Context Protocol support. AI agents can validate IBANs and look up BIC codes directly — no custom tooling required.
home.endpoints.heading: Endpoints & pricing
home.endpoints.subtitle: Currently free during beta. Prices below will apply when x402 micropayments are activated.
home.quickStart.heading: Quick start
home.quickStart.subtitle: No API key required — just send a request. Free during beta.
home.cta.heading: Ready to build?
home.cta.description: Integrate in minutes. Free during beta — no API key, no subscription.

pricing.metadata.title: Pricing
pricing.metadata.description: Simple, transparent pay-per-call pricing. No subscriptions. No API keys. Pay with USDC via x402 micropayments.
pricing.hero.description: No subscription. No API key. Fractions of a cent per request — billed on-chain with USDC via the x402 protocol.

pricing.x402.heading: How payments work
pricing.x402.items.0: No subscription. No API key. Pay per call with USDC.
pricing.x402.items.1: Your HTTP client sends a tiny payment with each request — automatically, via standard headers.
pricing.x402.items.2: Payments settle on Base (Ethereum L2) — fast, cheap, and verifiable on-chain.
pricing.x402.items.3: Free testing available via the /v1/demo endpoint and the /playground.
pricing.x402.codeExample.title: Example — automatic payment
pricing.faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
pricing.faq.0.question: What is x402?
pricing.faq.0.answer: x402 is an open micropayment protocol that uses HTTP status code 402 (Payment Required). When you call a paid endpoint, the server responds with a 402 containing payment details. Your client automatically sends a signed USDC payment on Base, and the server re-processes your request — all within a single HTTP round-trip.
pricing.faq.1.question: How do I pay?
pricing.faq.1.answer: Payments are made in USDC on the Base network. Your HTTP client (or SDK) handles it automatically by attaching payment headers to each request. No wallet UI, no manual confirmation — just fractions of a cent deducted per call. Check the docs for integration examples.
pricing.faq.2.question: Is there a free tier?
pricing.faq.2.answer: Yes. The /v1/demo endpoint returns pre-computed example validations at no cost, perfect for testing your integration. The /playground on this site lets you try live calls for free too. No signup or payment method required to get started.
pricing.faq.3.question: What about high volume?
pricing.faq.3.answer: The per-call pricing scales linearly with no rate limits. For very high volumes (millions of calls/month), open an issue on our GitHub repository (github.com/cammac-creator/ibanforge) — we can discuss custom pricing or a bulk arrangement that makes more sense for your use case.
pricing.cta.heading: Start building for free
pricing.cta.description: No credit card, no account. Hit the playground, read the docs, ship when you are ready.

compare.differentiators.heading: What makes IBANforge different
compare.differentiators.0.title: No API key, no subscription
compare.differentiators.0.body: x402 micropayments mean you pay per call in USDC — no credit card, no account, no monthly bill. Start using the API in minutes.
compare.differentiators.1.title: Built for AI agents
compare.differentiators.1.body: Native MCP (Model Context Protocol) server lets Claude, GPT-4, and other LLM agents call validate_iban and lookup_bic as structured tools — no prompt engineering needed.
compare.differentiators.2.title: Open source (MIT)
compare.differentiators.2.body: The full source is on GitHub. Audit the code, self-host for free, or contribute improvements. No vendor lock-in.
compare.cta.heading: Ready to try?
compare.cta.description: No account, no credit card. Open the playground and validate your first IBAN in under a minute.
